Once your account is deleted, all of its: Nje ukuba iakhawunti yakho icinyiwe, bonke oovimba kunye nedatha baya kucinywa ngokusisigxina. Nceda uqinisekise ukuba ungathanda ukucima iakhawunti yakho ngokusisigxina.
